# GYEON Q²M Trim Cleaner

$24.99

Sale
*•*

Default Title

This item is a recurring or deferred purchase. By continuing, I agree to the cancellation policy and authorize you to charge my payment method at the prices, frequency and dates listed on this page until my order is fulfilled or I cancel, if permitted. 

Description

GYEON Q²M Trim Cleaner allows you to lightly clean your trim with ease. 

Q²M Trim Cleaner is a gentle [plastic and interior maintenance cleaner](https://urbanwerksdetailshop.com/collections/glass-trim) formulated for regular use. It will not discolor or fade interior trim. This car vinyl cleaner removes dust and light dirt spots in a flash, leaving no residue behind. Q²M Trim Cleaner has light anti-static properties, making it a great everyday addition to your detailing kit.

[Shop all products by GYEON at Urban Werks Detail Shop.](https://urbanwerksdetailshop.com/collections/wash)

Read more

More Info

- Gently clean dirt and grime from various trim pieces.

- Can be applied to interior and exterior trim.

- Anti-static properties help repel future dust buildup.

- Leaves behind no reside, making it a great product to use before a dressing.

Use & Specifications

500 mL bottle. 

Spray on short-haired microfiber. Wipe the surface, then wipe dry with another side of the fiber if needed. Agitate with a brush and let dwell on rubber or exterior trim to enhance the cleaning power. Keep out of reach of children.

Q²M VinylCleaner also proves to be a perfect everyday maintenance product for interior trim, leaving a matte and factory fresh look.

Consumption: 100ml/car

ph: Neutral
